raw.subject: Sheryl's Candy Apple Creations in Jacksonville; Something I noticed about your dessert creations
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the creativity that goes into your custom apples and strawberries - it's clear you have a passion for what you do.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and as a restaurant, I think it might be worth considering - you could potentially be missing out on bookings and calls from customers who prefer to plan ahead.

I took a look at your Facebook posts and sketched out a page idea that might fit your business: a menu hero section to showcase your creative desserts, a hours block to keep customers informed, and a photo gallery to give them a taste of what you offer.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/sheryl-s-candy-apple-creations-jacksonville

I thought this might be a great opportunity for us to chat about building a website that fits your needs - it's a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in learning more, please reply or give me a quick call.

Let's get started.
